programme.title: E104 - Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: E821 - Roman Day
programme.desc: Granny Pig, Peppa and George have fun dressing up as Romans, making a pebble mosaic and learning a little Latin!

programme.title: E824 - Bat And Ball
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle teaches the children how to play Bat and Ball. She teaches them so well that they win the game!

programme.title: E104 - Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: E215 - Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: E216 - The Crew Builds A Bowling Alley / The Crew Builds A Superbloom Path
programme.desc: Rubble & the pups find Grandpa Gravel's lucky bowling ball. Too bad Builder Cove doesn't have a bowling alley... until now! // When a sudden superbloom traps Motor, Lily, and Park Ranger Rose, the pups need a flower-friendly construction solution.

programme.title: E103 - The Alebrije Adventure / Let's Get A Paleta
programme.desc: Ale the Alebrije asks Dora for her help! The Alebrije tree is wilting, so it's up to Dora to find its rainbow water. // On a super hot day, everyone wants paleta, but Val's paleta truck is stuck! Dora goes to rescue her and get paletas for everyone.

programme.title: E204 - Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: E109 - Let Justice Be Done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: E813 - Pups Save A Show Jumper / Pups Save The Salmon
programme.desc: Winnie Winnington goes looking for a frog to enter in a frog-jumping contest and ends up needing rescued in a swamp. // The pups must help salmon get to the ocean and also need to rescue Alex who gets stuck on top of a dam.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: E120 - The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: E821 - Roman Day
programme.desc: Granny Pig, Peppa and George have fun dressing up as Romans, making a pebble mosaic and learning a little Latin!

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E275 -Atonement
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: The Dumpling Queen
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Zang Jianhe, a woman from Qingdao, was forced to leave her hometown with her two daughters. To make ends meet and raise her children, she washed dishes by day and cleaned cars by night. With no one to rely on, she bore the immense pressure alone. Determined to break free from her fate, Zang Jianhe decided to make a living by selling dumplings. From struggling to attract customers to eventually thriving, she received much support from tough-but-kind Hong Jie, Brother Hua, and Uncle Dessert. Through perseverance, she grew her dumpling business into a success, and her life gradually opened up to new possibilities... The film is based on a true story.

programme.title: Chang An
programme.desc: A few years after the outbreak of the Anshi Rebellion, the Tubo army attacked the southwest. Gao Shi, who was trapped in the isolated city, recalled his life with Li Bai to the eunuch of the supervising army.

programme.title: Dream Lover
programme.desc: Cheung Ka-shing and Man have been friends for many years and both of them are the owner of a garage. Cheung has invented a chip to win the sports car competition and gave the right to use the chip to Wen after the race. Cheung met a lovely girl, Kitty and fell in love with her at first sight. A landslide occurred the day before Kitty moved out of her house, Kitty and Cheung were trapped in the car. The president of a large Japanese Corporation came to Hong Kong to find Cheung. After the group study the function of the chip, they believed that the chip has a very big potential market value. Cheung is hailed as the next-generation empire of the automotive industry. Cheung and Man have started to invest in real estate, stock market and other businesses. Cheung meets Kitty again at a banquet but found that she has married. Cheung accidentally meets a supernatural master who can help Cheung dreaming with Kitty, therefore Cheung has become fascinated the dreaming with Kitty and pay

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: In this episode Jamie's got recipes that make a hero of the freezer and store cupboard: using frozen fish to save on time, money and planning; making a super-speedy snack that gives frozen veggies their place in the sun; and two hearty dishes that elevate store-cupboard staples to the next level. And he's called on his mentor and all-round Italian legend, Gennaro Contaldo, to rustle up some delicious homemade gnocchi using just 5 easy ingredients.

programme.title: E1 - Jaipur
programme.desc: In Jaipur, new recruits prepare for the most important event of the year, a lavish dinner for the Maharaja of Jaipur. As managers work out how to deal with incontinent elephants, the young waiting staff must put on the biggest show of their careers.

E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E17 - Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E34 - The Dump
programme.desc: On a trip to the Dump, Dad claims he's the best at everything. But Bluey discovers that Dad's throwing out her old drawing and questions if he really is the best Dad in the world.

programme.title: E35 - Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey's backyard zoo is home to wonderful animals, especially the big blue Daddy gorilla. But when he grabs visitor Bingo and escapes, Zookeeper Bluey must recapture the wild beast.

programme.title: E12 - Grizzly Bears
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to Sierra Nevada in California, searching for a mother grizzly bear and her cubs.

programme.title: E19 - The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E1 - The Carrot Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E17 - Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E9 - Let's Do The Tubby
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and 'Do the Tubby!'.

programme.title: E34 - Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: E35 - Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: E36 - Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: E13 - Laid Back Shane
programme.desc: Shane is having too much fun to stop and refuel. That is, until he runs out of coal and is stranded in the hot, red desert.

programme.title: E37 - Kinderdijk, Netherlands
programme.desc: The Go Jetters travel to Kinderdijk in The Netherlands to celebrate National Mill Day.

programme.title: E38 - Great Mosque Of Djenne, Africa
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is invited to Djenne in Mali, Africa, to visit the people and to see one of his favourite things at work - mud.

programme.title: E11 - Pigs Might Fly
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo are great at picking apples with Mojo's crane top. But Preston's drone might be even better... until it accidentally scoops up Felix. Mojo and Bo are on the chase!

programme.title: E12 - Be Brave Bryan
programme.desc: Bryan gets spooked and thinks there's a lake monster lurking in the mists. It'll be Mojo and Bo who have to find the monster... or show Bryan that there's no monster at all!

programme.title: E25 - Aargh! Jelly!
programme.desc: Broccoli shows Supertato her latest art exhibition of jelly sculptures, but jelly is Supertato's secret fear. When Evil Pea finds out, she comes up with an evil idea to beat him.

programme.title: E12 - The Teamwork Badge
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: E14 - The Train Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Premium Spectacular: Incense and the Journey Home: A 2026 Cross-Strait Mazu Chronicle
programme.desc: In the third month of the lunar calendar, the 2026 Dajia Mazu Pilgrimage in Taiwan commenced as scheduled, spanning 9 days and 8 nights over a 340-kilometer trek that attracts more than 4 million participants annually. Our production crew went on-site to capture this most iconic Taiwanese cultural event, showcasing unique local folklore such as the Prince Troop and Bao Ma Zai, tracing the history of the Mazu faith crossing the sea from Meizhou, Fujian to Taiwan, and documenting Taiwanese devotees returning to Meizhou Island to pay homage to their ancestral temple. The documentary beautifully presents the millennium-old connection of shared incense spanning across the strait.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: E11 - Cold Hard Crashout
programme.desc: A seven-acre, snow-covered hoard pushes Matt to the brink. To clear the stairs, they toss 500 pounds of trash and hunt for lost gold on the top floor.

programme.title: E1 - Miners Vs Miners
programme.desc: Tensions erupt among the crews as miners battle to bring in big gold. From fistfights to meltdowns, these are the loudest moments when they clashed.

programme.title: E6 - Exorcism In Erie
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate a demonic possession and its impact on an Erie, CO, family.

programme.desc: Ant finds a 1929 Austin 7, but it has brake issues, poor lights, and a surprise fault. Plus, the deadline to finish the house restoration looms.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

The program presents various stories of women with different backgrounds, women fighting for equality, women in politics and their work, women promoting sexual education all over the world, women in sports, and women on the front line.

programme.title: Bs Special 'Beyond The Deep River, The Magpie Bridge'
programme.desc: 'Ink painting is the poetry of the heart.' Fu Yiyao, a sumi-e artist whose father was a master of Chinese ink painting, has worked in Japan for 46 years since moving there at 32, living between two countries through times of change. Her art is shaped by sorrow and hardship, a dialogue with nature, and journeys tracing great predecessors. In an age of growing global division, how does she face the world as an artist? This documentary follows her as she challenges a major work that marks the culmination of her career.

programme.title: E1 - Sammi, Rose, and Casey
programme.desc: Roam across America with a road-tripping chicken and meet a mouse family living in an English garden. Beat arachnophobia with a spider’s help, trek with the guardian of Earth’s last two northern white rhinos, and celebrate more interspecies pals.

programme.title: E2 - Bandit, Max, and George
programme.desc: Learn how cockatoos and platypuses inspired new careers, then explore the shared trauma that bonded a human and an elephant for life. Get playful with 35-year-old George the turkey vulture and say a moving farewell to human-raised kangaroos.

programme.title: E1 - A Penguin Proposal
programme.desc: Watch an Antarctic gentoo penguin pop the question with a rocky token of his devotion, then learn how a Madagascar lemur uses toxic millipedes for pest control. Bone up on makeup techniques with a flamingo and meet a honey badger that can pick locks.

programme.title: E1 - Sammi, Rose, and Casey
programme.desc: Roam across America with a road-tripping chicken and meet a mouse family living in an English garden. Beat arachnophobia with a spider’s help, trek with the guardian of Earth’s last two northern white rhinos, and celebrate more interspecies pals.

programme.title: E2 - Bandit, Max, and George

programme.title: E1 - Jungle Killers
programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the riverbank. A venomous snake is on the move. A Colombian tarantula waits for night fall. Watch as these fierce predators prowl through the jungle and bite into their next great meal.

programme.title: E6 - Migration
programme.desc: Epic flights, adventurous sea journeys and exhausting road trips all play a key part in the lives of many species. These empires travel in search of food, shelter or a mate. But booking and organizing travel is no easy feat when those plans involve hundreds – even thousands – of individuals.

programme.title: E1 - The Young Up-Start
programme.desc: Explore the lush treed cityscape where fluffy male Matnoor rules over the 30-member-strong Street Troop with an iron fist. Then meet Aarav, the old alpha who oversees the wilder Hill Troop. Which will up-and-comer Loci challenge for the crown?

programme.title: E2 - The Grass is Greener
programme.desc: Go on a junk-food-fuelled urban holiday with the Street Troop, then watch the Hill Troop’s invasion of their turf turn sour. Monitor the Sisterhood’s plot to kidnap Sara’s baby before newly minted alpha Loci discovers his old rival is back in town.

programme.title: Na Umra Ki Seema Ho
programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: E9 - China
programme.desc: In China, Rooftop and Catfish continue their East Asian adventures. As if the leeches in Indonesia weren’t enough, the bikers move on to bee sting therapy in China, strengthen their stomachs with some grasshoppers and mice wine, and attempt to transport hundreds of pounds of fish on nothing but a bike and sheer will power. The duo also undergo a hike of Chinese mountain Hua Shan, electro acupuncture, and kung fu train, all to be able to endure dim mak, ‘the death touch.’ Can Rooftop and Catfish handle this intense physical journey, or will the death touch get the best of them?

programme.title: E10 - Vietnam
programme.desc: Off to Vietnam next, Rooftop and Catfish embark on what may be their most dangerous visit yet. The BMX bikers start their journey relatively tame with a shot of snake blood. However, things quickly escalate from there with the most intense game of frogger they’ve ever played in the Vietnamese streets. From a hospital visit and racing through the Vietcong tunnels to trying fertilized baby bird eggs and relaxing in a boiling hot spring, nothing can prepare the duo for the ending of their trip heading to the demilitarized zone to detonate bombs. After this trip to Vietnam, what more heart-racing adventures and Rooftop and Catfish possibly find?

programme.title: E5 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E9 - L.A. Unplugged
programme.desc: A technology addicted mother and daughter need Bear’s help to unplug from the world of social media and experience life through the great outdoors. During their journey, Stacy and Zoe reconnect with each other and share an adventure worth posting about online.

programme.title: E4 - Ben Stiller
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls meets actor Ben Stiller (The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)) on the rugged mountains of the Isle of Skye in Northern Scotland, to go on a once in a lifetime adventure. As they explore their surroundings, Bear tests Ben's limits in an effort to see how he measures up to the unpredictable and unforgiving challenges of Mother Nature.

programme.title: E3 - TeamS4H/Training Camp
programme.desc: With HurtCamp complete, Commando and Adam have a big decision to make as to which athletes will join the team for season 4.

programme.title: E4 - Backyard Ultra
programme.desc: Event one for the team is the hottest ultra running event format around, Backyard Ultra, in rural Victoria.

programme.title: E3 - Kamilaroi Highway (Part 2)
programme.desc: Part Two of our Kamilaroi Highway road-trip starts in Lightning Ridge and wraps up in Bourke, and we’re blessed with more sensational countryside, and the awesome stories that make this area of Australia so popular. This is a part of Australia everyone needs to discover.

programme.title: E4 - Sturts Steps
programme.desc: Flanked by three Australian States this journey re-traces part of the expedition undertaken by European Explorer Charles Sturt in the 1840’s, when he was looking to discover an inland sea, in the very interior of the country.

Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E4 - Sturts Steps
programme.desc: Flanked by three Australian States this journey re-traces part of the expedition undertaken by European Explorer Charles Sturt in the 1840’s, when he was looking to discover an inland sea, in the very interior of the country.

programme.title: E1 - Let The Titan Games Begin Trials
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson redefines the athletic competition, giving exceptional men and women from all walks of life the chance to test their physical strength and mental fortitude for the chance to battle on Mount Olympus in hopes of becoming a Titan.

programme.title: E3 - The Titan Games Trials 3
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: E1 - Sick Day
programme.desc: Adam stays home sick from school one day. Jake is so distraught over the absence of his best pal.

programme.title: E2 - Cuddlemuffins
programme.desc: Adam makes the mistake of petting one of the adorable PETTING ZOO KIDS.

programme.title: E5 - The Spiffanos
programme.desc: After Adam borrows a pencil from Phinneas Porpoise, he finds himself indebted to the Spiffies. To pay back the debt, Adam agrees to make a secret 'delivery', but Jake tags along, and things quickly go south.

programme.title: E11 - Pride And Pixiefrog
programme.desc: When Principal Pixiefrog wins the Principal of the Year Award, his ego goes through the roof, eventually becoming too big for CDMS to handle.

programme.title: E18 - Mellow Fellows
programme.desc: Slips is one depressed snake. Until, that is, he befriends a new mentor, Mr. Mandrill, and realizes that his life's calling is to be a guidance counselor, too.

programme.title: E6 - Rudy's Doctor Dilemma
programme.desc: Rudy feels scared of going to the doctor’s office to get a shot, so Nina and Abby show him how to do heart breaths to help him feel better.

programme.title: E18 - Mellow Fellows
programme.desc: Slips is one depressed snake. Until, that is, he befriends a new mentor, Mr. Mandrill, and realizes that his life's calling is to be a guidance counselor, too.

programme.title: E38 - Betz - Bouchet
programme.desc: The Chateau of Betz is a real fortress: it includes a drawbridge, arrow slits, machicolations, and the infamous dungeons. Located on an exceptional site, the Chateau of Bouchet offers a unique view of the regional park.

programme.title: E17 - Lentil Salad
programme.desc: Leila Albert opens her kitchen doors to Cindy Fischer, a shepherd turned restaurateur. Cindy concocts a lentil and soft-boiled egg salad with a twist: a Burgundy truffle-infused cream.

programme.title: E3 - A Little Pig In The City
programme.desc: Petanque has many enthusiasts in Switzerland. In Geneva, the bowling grounds are historic, such as the one in Les Cropettes, where people from all walks of life gather for the love of the game.

programme.title: E15 - At Mont-Saint-Michel, With Geraldine Danon
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at Mont-Saint-Michel with actress and director Geraldine Danon. On today's menu: marinated and grilled salt-meadow lamb.

programme.title: E3 - Olive Oil In Pastries, Sweet And Savoury
programme.desc: Still accompanied by comedian Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers a Spanish recipe for sweet anise and sesame biscuits, and a leek quiche. The doughs are made with olive oil! Discovery of the day: Vaud almonds.

programme.title: E10 - Baker's Man

programme.desc: After NCIS captures the hitman known as 'The Poet,' the team races to uncover who ordered the assassination of a Navy Chief.

programme.title: E19 - Irreconcilable Differences
programme.desc: McGee's career and credibility are on the line when he investigates the deputy director for corruption. Also, Torres and Knight receive some surprising news.

programme.desc: After receiving intelligence on deadly threats to multiple locations that could lead to a catastrophic war, NCIS is called in to try to neutralize the danger.

programme.desc: NCIS investigates a murder related to a car that begins driving on its own.

programme.desc: NCIS stages a fake wedding for two of its own in an attempt to take down the mob.

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E10 - Mindful Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! Blippi shrinks down to fly inside a beehive & learn how honey is made, & explores a garbage truck to find out why flies love it so much. Then, it’s a trip through a factory to see how chocolate is made! The adventure even travels through time as Blippi meets his great-grandpa to see the very first cars. Plus, Blippi & FETCH help a nervous crane learn to build a skyscraper!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: The K-Gim Revolution
programme.desc: From the Korean table to tables around the world, gim is gaining global recognition. What makes gim so compelling? Michelin three-star chef Anh Sung-jae follows the journey of gim as a K-food icon.

programme.title: E16 - Hoisin Sloppy Janes On Bao Buns
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece kicks off this incredible meal with crispy purple yam jojos, inspired by the Pacific Northwest. Coated in oil and a seasoned flour mixture, they're baked to perfection.

programme.title: E5 - Vegetarian Feast
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to prepare a meat-free holiday meal that everyone will love! First, she makes a flavourful soup using Italian pumpkins. Next, she prepares her family's traditional 'Holiday Stars'.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: They meet the finest biker of Jiri Mountain, a poet who fled city life to live in the mountains. From this poet, who captures photos of stars and flowers, the two actors learn poetry.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: Lured Into War: Russia's Foreign Fighters In Ukraine
programme.desc: Russia is using foreign fighters in its war against Ukraine. Often, they are from poorer countries in Africa, Asia, and Latin America.

programme.title: From Trash To Treasure
programme.desc: Reduce, reuse and recycle - to live a waste free life is the goal of more and more people around the world. But where to start? HER introduces women with creative and innovative ideas on how to consume less and recycle more. And sometimes it's also, about showing that even waste can be turned into something wonderful.

programme.title: Understand The World, One Story At A Time
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.desc: Gaudi's Sagrada Familia is one of Barcelona's defining landmarks. Plus: Germany's largest Hindu temple, and Poland's favorite comfort food, bigos.

programme.title: The Future Of Travel: Apps, Ai, Robots - And The Loss Of Adventure?
programme.desc: Imagine arriving in a new country and having an AI guide, translator, and trip planner in your pocket. That future is already here! We'll show you useful travel apps, explain what AI can already do and show you robotics innovations happening in the travel industry. But: as travel becomes easier than ever, are we losing what made it meaningful in the first place?

programme.title: E143 - Sticky Situation/Mo Almighty
programme.desc: In order to join the Robot Club, Mo must solve a puzzle. So, he asks for the power of glue, but it works too well, to the point of making everything he touches stick to him.

programme.title: E9 - Valentine's Bean/All You Can Eat
programme.desc: Mr Bean tries to be romantic but his idea of romance is very different from his girlfriend’s.

programme.title: E110 - Hearts Of The Fathers
programme.desc: It’s Thanksgiving, and Clark, Lois, and Jimmy are heading to the Kent farm to celebrate – but the holiday turns into a fight for survival as Task Force X, family, and Kryptonite collide!

programme.title: E2 - B. Le Quack Amnesia Specialist/Cowboy Courage/Angry Nasty People/Dome of Doom/The God
programme.desc: Muriel experiences amnesia after being struck on the head by a piece of the farmhouse roof. Courage summons help, which arrives in the form of a French con artist duck posing as a doctor.

programme.title: E116 - The Gourmet/The Pool
programme.desc: After tasting Masami’s gourmet, double-truffle mac-n-cheese at lunch, Gumball decides to do whatever it takes to get a full serving of the delicious meal.

programme.title: E132 - Spring Forks/Karate Chop Flop/A Slippery Slope/A Screw Loose/Best Dad/The Photoshoot/
programme.desc: Trico hands out forks to the flock. While Wolf pretends to be vegetarian to get a piece of the action, Wanda hacks the cutlery and uses them like springs on her feet. Trico isn’t so happy about her tableware manners.

programme.title: E145 - Stretching The Truth/Bad Bzzz
programme.desc: Sam asks for the power of elasticity. Her body stretches but doesn't snap back to its initial shape. She must find Mo, but he's on another adventure in the forest with Lenny!

programme.title: E147 - Good Old Mo/Who Took The Fly Swatter
programme.desc: Mo and Lenny are too young to see the movie they've been waiting for. Mo asks for the power to age, but with half the power, everyone around Sam and Mo gets mentally younger!

programme.title: E11 - Flat Pack/Holiday Teddy
programme.desc: Mr Bean buys a new bookcase but it is missing one vital element!

programme.title: E1 - Laser Light Cannon/Cheeseburger Backpack/Gem Glow
programme.desc: A magical comet hurtles toward Beach City, and Steven must dig through his father's collection of old junk, and the past, to find the weapon that can save the town.

programme.title: E814
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: E312 - 2
programme.desc: Time flew by, yet Tulsi Virani stood strong as the Sarvagunn matriarch! Can she navigate the challenges of modern-day parenting and relationships?

programme.title: E5185
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: E757
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

UEFA Women's Champions League 2025/26 E75 -Barcelona vs Lyon - Final
E25
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.desc: A wife runs berserk when her husband, an automobile shop entrepreneur-mechanic, pays more than casual attention to a younger woman.

programme.title: Resibo: Walang Lusot Ang May Atraso
programme.desc: A public service program aimed at giving a voice to the public's grievances and complaints, exposing wrongdoing, and providing concrete resolutions.

programme.title: Tao Po[Live]
programme.desc: 'Tao Po' is a compelling Current Affairs program that uncovers the lives of the 'real people' behind the headlines, offering intimate interviews and insightful glimpses into their personal journeys and the issues they represent.

programme.title: Everybody Sing
programme.desc: Everybody, Sing! is the first and original community singing game show where 100 contestants play together in a series of guess-the-lyrics karaoke challenges to win more than 2,000,000 pesos to be shared by everybody.

programme.title: Next In Line: Young Pinoy Athletes On The Rise[Live]
programme.desc: The documentary follows the journey of the next generation of Filipino athletes who are all trying to make a name from themselves in their respective sports. Journalist Paige Javier introduces five young Filipino athletes and their dreams of competing on the world stage; gymnasts Eldrew Yulo and Tchelzy Maayo, tennis player Maristella Torrecampo, and pole vaulters JV Pacheco and Marvi Marcelo.

programme.title: Tubig To Handle
programme.desc: Get ready to get soaked! 💦 Experience the wettest, wildest, and wackiest game show in the Philippines - Tubig To Handle!. From slippery slides to heart-pumping showdowns, every episode is packed with non-stop action, laughter, and pure Pinoy fun. Hosted by Yassi Pressman and your favorite stars, this splash-filled adventure is guaranteed to bring nonstop laughter, thrills, and all-out water fun like never before!

programme.title: E9 - 一次性打卡6大非遺項目
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E6 - 畫風不同的兩個爸爸討論帶娃經驗
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E6 - 畫風不同的兩個爸爸討論帶娃經驗

programme.title: E2 - 路演在即全員忘我排練
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E20 - 跌跌撞撞才懂自己想要什麼
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.desc: In Switzerland, Captain Meyer narrowly escapes death after receiving a statuette of a devil with red eyes. An inexplicable coincidence: on the French side, the same object is found by gendarme Vivier near the body of a timber dealer mysteriously deceased in an isolated chapel.

programme.title: E1 - Snow Crab And North Atlantic Right Whale
programme.desc: The North Atlantic right whale, an endangered species with fewer than 360 individuals, is threatened by crab fishing ropes. Scientists and fishers are working together to balance wildlife protection and economic activity.

programme.title: Sami La Fugue
programme.desc: A winter in Franche-Comte. Sami, committed to a psychiatric hospital, receives a visit from his mother and younger sister, who tell him that their mare has died. The news sends everything reeling...

programme.title: E51 - Welcome To My Home
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E42 - Toothbrush
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: E30 - So Sorry In The Forest
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!
